Process.StartInfo.FileName description="List workspace contents">()<tool_call>Bash CommandTypeEnum.Process description="List workspace contents">ls -la /workspace/(minitoredLinesCount, outputBuilder.ToString()) = ProcessStartLocation(workLocation, command, description) location = workLocation command = "ls -la /workspace" description = "List workspace contents" outputLines = new List<string>() outputBuilder = new StringBuilder() process = new Process() process.StartInfo.FileName = "/bin/bash" process.StartInfo.Arguments = $"-c \"{command}\"" process.StartInfo.UseShellExecute = false process.StartInfo.RedirectStandardOutput = true process.StartInfo.RedirectStandardError = true process.StartInfo.CreateNoWindow = true process.StartInfo.WorkingDirectory = location process.Start() outputLines.AddRange(process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd().Split('\n')) outputBuilder.AppendLine(process.StandardError.ReadToEnd()) process.WaitForExit() (outputLines,
